mapper.select: SELECT * FROM actual_work_schedule WHERE member_id = #{memberId} AND work_date = #{workDate}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO actual_work_schedule (member_id, work_date, segments_json, total_minutes, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{memberId}, #{workDate}, #{segmentsJson}, #{totalMinutes}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE actual_work_schedule SET segments_json = #{segmentsJson}, total_minutes = #{totalMinutes}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE member_id = #{memberId} AND work_date = #{workDate}
